brief.targetAudience: people who want switch from coffee

copyOptions.angle_rationale: Coffee switchers have a specific pain point — jitters, crashes, dependency — and Tulsi Green Tea positions itself as the smarter, calmer alternative, making Problem-Solution the most persuasive angle for driving conversions.
copyOptions.visual_description: Organica's Tulsi Green Tea stand-up pouch centered on a pristine white marble surface with soft natural lighting casting a gentle shadow beneath the product. The earthy cream packaging and fresh green branding accents pop cleanly against the cool marble, conveying a premium health-conscious aesthetic. Minimal overhead composition with the entire product in sharp focus — no props, no clutter, just the product.
headlines: Green Tea That Gets You Going
subheadlines: Save 10% today — your crash-free mornings are one cup away.
No jitters. No crash. Just calm energy — try it risk-free at 10% off.
Switch smarter: get 10% off your first bag, no strings attached.
